title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data to uncover trends and support decision-making. Build dashboards and reports for stakeholders across departments.
required_skills: SQL, Excel, Tableau, Python, Statistical Analysis

title: Senior Data Analyst
description: Lead analytics projects end-to-end and mentor junior analysts. Work with product and engineering teams to define KPIs and measure success.
required_skills: SQL, Python, Power BI, A/B Testing, Data Modeling

title: Data Scientist
description: Build predictive models and machine learning pipelines to solve business problems. Collaborate with engineering to deploy models to production.
required_skills: Python, Machine Learning, Scikit-learn, SQL, Statistics

title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Drive ML strategy and design experiments. Develop advanced models for recommendation and personalization systems at scale.
required_skills: Python, Deep Learning, TensorFlow, MLflow, Feature Engineering

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design and maintain ML infrastructure and pipelines. Package and serve models at scale in cloud environments.
required_skills: Python, MLOps, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS SageMaker

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and warehouse infrastructure. Ensure data quality and availability across the organization.
required_skills: Python, SQL, Apache Spark, Airflow, dbt

title: Senior Data Engineer
description: Architect data platforms and lead migration of legacy pipelines to modern cloud-native solutions. Mentor junior engineers.
required_skills: Spark, Kafka, Snowflake, Terraform, Python

title: Analytics Engineer
description: Transform raw data into clean well-documented datasets. Own the analytics layer using dbt and work closely with analysts and scientists.
required_skills: dbt, SQL, Snowflake, Python, Data Modeling

title: Business Intelligence Developer
description: Develop and maintain BI dashboards and data models. Translate business requirements into actionable reports for leadership.
required_skills: Power BI, SQL, DAX, Data Warehousing, Excel

title: Data Science Manager
description: Lead a team of data scientists and set roadmap priorities. Align ML initiatives with business goals and present findings to C-level stakeholders.
required_skills: Python, Machine Learning, Team Leadership, Stakeholder Management, SQL

title: NLP Engineer
description: Develop natural language processing models for text classification and entity extraction. Build and maintain conversational AI applications.
required_skills: Python, NLP, Transformers, HuggingFace, spaCy

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Build and deploy image recognition and object detection models for industrial and consumer-facing applications.
required_skills: Python, PyTorch, OpenCV, YOLO, CNNs

title: Quantitative Analyst
description: Develop statistical and mathematical models for financial risk assessment and pricing. Build and backtest algorithmic trading strategies.
required_skills: Python, R, Statistics, Time Series, Financial Modeling

title: Data Architect
description: Design enterprise-wide data architecture including data lakes and warehouses. Define data standards and governance frameworks.
required_skills: Data Modeling, SQL, Cloud Platforms, Data Governance, ETL Design

title: MLOps Engineer
description: Build CI/CD pipelines for machine learning models and monitor model drift. Ensure reliable model deployment and automated retraining workflows.
required_skills: MLflow, Docker, Kubernetes, Python, CI/CD

title: Data Governance Analyst
description: Establish and enforce data quality standards and metadata management. Drive compliance policies across the data platform.
required_skills: Data Governance, SQL, Collibra, Data Quality, GDPR

title: Research Scientist
description: Conduct research in deep learning and prototype novel architectures. Publish findings and advance the company AI capabilities.
required_skills: Python, PyTorch, Research, Mathematics, Deep Learning

title: Product Analyst
description: Analyze user behavior and product metrics to guide product decisions. Design and evaluate A/B tests across the product lifecycle.
required_skills: SQL, Python, A/B Testing, Google Analytics, Data Visualization

title: Data Platform Engineer
description: Build and operate the internal data platform used by analysts scientists and engineers. Focus on reliability scalability and developer experience.
required_skills: Python, Spark, Databricks, AWS, Infrastructure as Code

title: AI/ML Product Manager
description: Define the roadmap for AI-powered product features. Work cross-functionally with data science engineering and design to ship ML-driven experiences.
required_skills: Product Management, Machine Learning Fundamentals, SQL, Agile, Stakeholder Communication
